title: potentilla recta var. subsericea
intro: Potentilla recta var. subsericea, also known as a dwarf or hairy cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Potentilla recta var. subsericea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
